# Model definition for stock return prediction
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class ResidualBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim, dropout_rate=0.1):
        super(ResidualBlock, self).__init__()
        self.linear1 = nn.Linear(dim, dim)
        self.bn1 = nn.BatchNorm1d(dim)
        self.relu = nn.ReLU()
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout_rate)
        self.linear2 = nn.Linear(dim, dim)
        self.bn2 = nn.BatchNorm1d(dim)
        
    def forward(self, x):
        residual = x
        out = self.linear1(x)
        out = self.bn1(out)
        out = self.relu(out)
        out = self.dropout(out)
        out = self.linear2(out)
        out = self.bn2(out)
        out = self.relu(out + residual)  # Add residual connection
        return out

class AttentionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim):
        super(AttentionLayer, self).__init__()
        self.query = nn.Linear(dim, dim // 4)
        self.key = nn.Linear(dim, dim // 4)
        self.value = nn.Linear(dim, dim // 4)
        self.softmax = nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        self.out_proj = nn.Linear(dim // 4, dim)
        
    def forward(self, x):
        Q = self.query(x)
        K = self.key(x)
        V = self.value(x)
        
        attention_scores = torch.matmul(Q, K.transpose(-2, -1)) / (K.size(-1) ** 0.5)
        attention_weights = self.softmax(attention_scores)
        
        attended_values = torch.matmul(attention_weights, V)
        output = self.out_proj(attended_values)
        
        return output

class StockReturnPredictor(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim=158, hidden_dims=[512, 512, 256, 256, 128, 128], dropout_rate=0.1):
        super(StockReturnPredictor, self).__init__()
        
        layers = []
        prev_dim = input_dim
        
        # Initial projection layer
        layers.extend([
            nn.Linear(prev_dim, hidden_dims[0]),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dims[0]),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout_rate)
        ])
        prev_dim = hidden_dims[0]
        
        # Process hidden dimensions
        i = 1
        while i < len(hidden_dims):
            curr_dim = hidden_dims[i]
            if curr_dim == prev_dim:
                # Add residual block when dimensions match
                layers.append(ResidualBlock(curr_dim, dropout_rate))
            else:
                # Add regular layer when dimensions change
                layers.extend([
                    nn.Linear(prev_dim, curr_dim),
                    nn.BatchNorm1d(curr_dim),
                    nn.ReLU(),
                    nn.Dropout(dropout_rate)
                ])
            prev_dim = curr_dim
            i += 1
        
        # Add attention layer
        layers.append(AttentionLayer(prev_dim))
        layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(prev_dim))
        layers.append(nn.ReLU())
        layers.append(nn.Dropout(dropout_rate))
        
        # Output layer for single return prediction
        layers.append(nn.Linear(prev_dim, 1))
        
        self.network = nn.Sequential(*layers)
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.network(x)
